title: Workday Named a Leader in the 2023 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Financial Planning Software
text: Company Positioned as a Leader Based on Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute PLEASANTON, Calif. , Dec. 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ --  Workday  (NASDAQ: WDAY), a leader in enterprise cloud applications for  finance and human resources , today announced it has been named a Leader in the 2023 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Financial Planning Software * for the second time since the category's inception last year.
